title: Surgical Timeout Exceeded Before Incision
scenario: A surgical timeout is completed, but incision is delayed beyond the permitted timeout validity interval.
initial_state: The surgical timeout established temporary execution readiness.
state_transition: The timeout validity interval elapsed before incision.
execution_boundary: The incision is evaluated immediately before execution.
constitutional_evaluation: Time-bound readiness checks must remain valid at the execution boundary.
constitutional_basis: Execution is inadmissible because the surgical timeout no longer supplies current temporal admissibility.
proof_conclusion: Surgical execution must fail closed when timeout validity expires before incision.
clinical_action: Begin incision after timeout validity expired
